name: Aguila Copper Corp.
description: Aguila Copper Corp., formerly Aguila American Gold Ltd., is a Canada-based copper and precious metals exploration company. The company is focused on acquiring and developing high-grade copper and gold projects in mining-friendly jurisdictions in North America. Its key projects include the Sherridon copper-zinc-gold-silver project in Manitoba and the Lida copper project in Nevada, aiming to discover and develop resources to support the green energy transition.
